headline: Qualcomm, Merck, Rockwell Automation And A Real Estate Stock On CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: Jim Lebenthal suggests investing in Qualcomm on CNBC's Halftime Report, while Stephanie Link chose Rockwell Automation.
